backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining user profile management (sport, skill level, location permission) and helicopter booking via Google Calendar HTTP outcalls, with anonymous-user guards and a transform function for HTTP response normalization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three high-confidence features for ActivateSportScreen: importing useSport context, dynamic button label based on active sport state, and toggling between activate/deactivate handlers.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Truncated JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key changes, covering pages, components, and context files in the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens (colors, radius, chart, sidebar) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Sport Buddies SPA, mounting the React app at `#root` and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining all application routes under two layouts (full nav and header-only), wrapped in QueryClientProvider and SportProvider, with a Toaster and NotFoundPage fallback.
frontend/src/components/BottomTabBar.tsx: Fixed bottom navigation bar with five tabs (Home, Map, Events, Coins, Profile) using maroon background and gold active state, with exact-match detection for the Home tab.
frontend/src/components/DebugBanner.tsx: Debug overlay component displaying current route path, authentication status, and profile completion status as badge pills.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React class-based error boundary that catches render errors and displays a fallback UI with the error message and a 'Go Home' button.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed top header with the Sport Buddies logo/wordmark linking to home, a coin balance pill linking to /coins, a QR scan button linking to /scan, and an emergency shield button linking to /emergency.
Simple full-screen loading spinner component displayed while lazy-loaded routes or async data are pending.
frontend/src/components/LocationPermissi: A modal dialog component that prompts the user to enable location access, with Cancel and Enable Location buttons and an optional requesting state.
frontend/src/components/PresenceBanner.t: A fixed top banner displaying a live sport presence status with an animated ping indicator that stops flashing after a specified timestamp.
frontend/src/components/ScreenBanner.tsx: A simple debug banner component that displays the current screen name and route name in a styled yellow bar.
frontend/src/context/SportContext.tsx: Defines the SportContext with state and actions for sport activation, user mode, events, attendance, and coin balance, seeded with initial mock events and a current user.
frontend/src/hooks/useActivationStatus.t: A hook that manages a timed 'OUT_NOW' activation status persisted in localStorage, with a 10-second countdown and automatic expiry cleanup.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an Internet Computer actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttendance.ts: A hook that tracks attended event IDs in localStorage, awards 5 coins on first attendance, and synchronizes state across tabs via custom events.
frontend/src/hooks/useCoinBalance.ts: A hook that manages a persistent coin balance in localStorage and synchronizes updates across components using a custom browser event.
frontend/src/hooks/useCoinScanner.ts: A hook that wraps QR scanning to validate scanned codes against a predefined list, awards coins for unclaimed valid codes, and tracks claimed codes in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useEventJoinState.ts: A hook that persists joined event IDs and participant count overrides in localStorage, providing join/leave actions and cross-tab synchronization via custom events.
frontend/src/hooks/useHelicopterAvailabi: React Query hook that calls the backend `checkHelicopterAvailability` actor method and returns parsed busy time blocks for a given time range, with error handling for non-JSON responses.
React Query mutation hook that submits a helicopter booking to the backend `bookHelicopter` actor method and invalidates availability queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and identity state persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocationPermission: Hook that checks and requests browser geolocation permission, exposing the current permission state and a function to prompt the user for access.
frontend/src/hooks/usePresenceState.ts: Hook that manages an 'OUT_NOW' presence status in localStorage with a 10-minute expiry and a 10-second flash indicator, providing activate/clear functions and periodic expiry checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for backend interactions: checking profile completion, fetching a user profile, and completing a profile via mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useRedemptions.ts: Hook that manages reward redemption records in localStorage, supporting adding new redemptions with generated codes and retrieving them by ID, with cross-tab sync via storage events.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining the app's maroon/gold/black brand theme via CSS custom properties, base styles, and utility classes for buttons, inputs, and scrollbars.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider`.
frontend/src/pages/ActivateSportScreen.t: Screen that lets users select a sport and activate/deactivate their live presence, handling location permission checks and persisting state to localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/AuthPage.tsx: Authentication page that provides Sign In/Sign Up via Internet Identity, then redirects users to either the home page or profile setup based on profile completion.
frontend/src/pages/CoinGrabPage.tsx: QR code scanning page that awards coins to users for scanning valid, unclaimed QR codes, tracking claimed codes in localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/CoinsPage.tsx: Coins dashboard showing the user's coin balance and action cards for earning coins via helicopter reservations, UPC/QR scanning, and friend invites.
frontend/src/pages/CreateEventPage.tsx: Placeholder page for event creation that displays a prefilled sport from URL params and a stub message indicating the feature is coming soon.
frontend/src/pages/EmergencyPage.tsx: Minimal placeholder page that renders an Emergency heading with no functionality.
frontend/src/pages/EmergencyShieldPage.t: Emergency SOS page with a hold-to-activate button that triggers an emergency shield, logs actions (notify buddies, call 911), and enforces a cooldown after deactivation.
frontend/src/pages/EventDetailPage.tsx: Displays full details for a single event (title, sport, date, location, participants) and provides actions for joining, leaving, completing, canceling, and marking attendance, with coin rewards for attendance.
frontend/src/pages/EventsPage.tsx: Lists all events with sport-filter chips that auto-sync with the active sport from context, and allows navigation to event details or event creation.
frontend/src/pages/HelicopterPage.tsx: Form page for booking a helicopter ride that checks slot availability via a calendar API, validates passenger/weight inputs, and supports payment by cash or coins (costing 2000 coins).
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page with an activate/deactivate sport CTA, quick-nav buttons for Map, Helicopter, Marketplace, and Emergency Shield, and a presence banner when the user is marked as Out Now.
frontend/src/pages/HowItWorksPage.tsx: Static informational page explaining the coin-earning steps (activate sport, scan QR codes, attend events, redeem in store) with a coin value reference table.
frontend/src/pages/InvitePage.tsx: Page for sharing a referral invite link via clipboard copy or the native Web Share API, with a brief explanation of the referral coin reward flow.
frontend/src/pages/MapPage.tsx: Displays a 'Nearby Buddies' map page with sport filters, a mock list of nearby users, and a 'Go Live' button that updates the user's status in localStorage. Auto-syncs the sport filter with the active sport from SportContext.
frontend/src/pages/MarketplacePage.tsx: Renders a marketplace page with two tabs: a gear listing market (with mock items and a 'Post an Item' button) and a pro shops directory, using toast notifications for user interactions.
frontend/src/pages/NotFoundPage.tsx: Simple 404 page that displays a 'Route Not Found' message and a button to navigate back to the home route.
frontend/src/pages/PresenceDetailPage.ts: Shows a detail view for a nearby buddy identified by route param ID, displaying their sport, status, distance, and action buttons to invite to an event or scan a QR code.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: User profile page that displays identity info, allows selecting a presence status, toggling location permission via a modal, and provides logout and emergency shield navigation actions.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupPage.tsx: Onboarding form page that collects a user's name, primary sport, skill level, and location permission preference, then submits via the completeProfile mutation and navigates to home on success.
Displays the details of a single coin redemption including item name, cost, status, redemption code (with copy button), and claim instructions. Fetches the redemption by ID from URL params and shows a not-found state if missing.
frontend/src/pages/SafetyPage.tsx: Safety hub page with two feature cards—Emergency Shield and Emergency Notifications—each offering Setup and Learn actions via navigation or toast messages.
frontend/src/pages/ScannerStubPage.tsx: Placeholder scanner page shown in preview/non-device environments, displaying a camera-unavailable message and description based on the 'type' query param (upc or qr).
frontend/src/pages/ScanPage.tsx: Scan landing page with two options—Scan UPC/CoinGrab and Scan QR Badge—both navigating to the coin-grab route if a camera is available, or showing a fallback toast in preview environments.
frontend/src/pages/SessionPage.tsx: Simple page that displays a session ID extracted from URL params.
frontend/src/pages/SOSLogPage.tsx: Shows a history of SOS/emergency events stored in localStorage, displaying start time, duration, and actions taken for each event. Includes a clear-all confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/StorePage.tsx: Coin store page listing redeemable items filterable by category, with a confirmation flow that deducts coins from the balance and navigates to the redemption detail page on success.
frontend/src/services/calendarIntegratio: Stub service for Google Calendar integration providing mock implementations of `getCalendarFreeBusy` and `createBookingEvent` that simulate API delays and return hardcoded values for MVP use.
frontend/src/utils/safeNavigate.ts: Utility that validates a target route path against a whitelist of known prefixes before navigating, showing a 'Coming soon' toast for unrecognized routes.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based semantic colors, brand colors (maroon, gold, charcoal), border radii, box shadows, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot for 'Sport Buddies' describing existing features around the SportContext and ActivateSportScreen toggle button, plus a pending feature request for the smart activation modal button.
